case_title: MARK SWINGLE et al VS. FOREST CITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SWINGLE, MARK SWINGLE, MONICA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FOREST CITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -SIGNED SERVED JAN-29-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FOREST CITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-19-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MILAN KURUC--GENERAL MANAGER, AGENT FOR LANDLORD. NO COSTS, AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWINGLE, MARK SWINGLE, MONICA AS TO DEFENDANT FOREST CITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SWINGLE, MARK SWINGLE, MONICA AS TO DEFENDANT FOREST CITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FOREST CITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT
